content.full_text:
State of California Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

Technical Assistance/Administration      Executive-Legal      Enforcement      Conflict of Interest
(916) 322-5660                          322-5901           322-6441         322-6444

September 1, 1977

John J. Mazer
1620 Vista Grande Drive
Hemet, California 92343

Dear Mr. Mazer:

Thank you for your letters of August 17 and 29, 1977, requesting information on the provisions under the Political Reform Act for conflicts of interest violations.

Enclosed for your information is a copy of the Political Reform Act of 1974, as amended, and the Conflicts of Interest Division's blue manual entitled "Informational Materials, Conflict of Interest Codes". The manual contains copies of the Regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission.

In your letters, you also requested the telephone number and the address of the Commission's branch office. The office is located at 107 S. Broadway, Room 9028, Los Angeles 90024. The phone number is 213/620-5196. The Commission's investigator in the Los Angeles office is Jim Willis.

If I can be of any further assistance to you, please do not hesitate to call this office.

Sincerely,

Delbert L. Spurlock, Jr., Chief
Conflicts of Interest Division

/mfa
enclosures

FPFC
SEP 1 1910 AM 77

Aug 29, 77

Dear Sir,

A couple of weeks ago I wrote and asked for a copy of the compiled interest laws. Here on [illegible] the laws, I have put it for them to use on the Judgeminors. Would like to know if you have a digest as Bigwood a Revised a Tax lien, I would like to have them together in one address so I can make contact with also again. Would appreciate the information by telephone. I can contact them by telephone.

Would appreciate this information as soon as

Yours

John J. Wyzga
1650 Quirt Blvd
Hemet Calif. 92343

27/4-658-0054

Aug 17, 79

Dear Sir:

I would like to get some information on how to go about, removing a council man from office. He violat the conflict of intiest laws and I believe I have enough evidence to prove the point.

There an office in S.A. a the Riverside County.

I there we an in the Riverside county and if I have to go there, I would like to talk to someone who could guid me as how to go about this, in the proper manner, and reach the judge channels.

Yours

John J. Mazer
1650 Vista Grande Dr.
Sierra Dawn Estates
Hemet, California 92343

Enclosed for your information is a copy of the Political Reform Act of 1974, as amended, and the Conflicts of Interest Division's blue manual entitled "Informational Materials, Conflict of Interest Codes." The manual contains copies of the Regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission. In your letters, you also requested the telephone number and the address of the Commission's branch office. The office is located at 107 S. Broadway, Room 9028, Los Angeles 90024. The phone number is 213/620-5196. The Commission's investigator in the Los Angeles office is Jim Willis. If I can be of any further assistance to you, please do not hesitate to call this office. Sincerely, Delbert L. Spurlock, Jr. Chief Conflicts of Interest Division /mfa enclosures FPPC SEP 1 910 AM '77 Aug 29, '77 A couple of weeks ago I wrote and asked for a copy of the conflict of interest laws. Here in Ht we violate the laws, I have plenty on them to give in the proper manner. Would like to go about it if you have a branch in Riverside or Los Angeles address so I can make contact, also a person's name if I can contact them by telephone. Would appreciate this information as soon as possible. Yours, John J Mayer 1650 Vista Grande Dr Hemet (Cal. 92343) Aug 17, '79 Dear Sir, I would like to get some information on how to go about removing a council man from office. He violates the conflict of interest law, and I believe I have enough evidence to prove the point. Have we an office in L.A. or the Riverside County? I know we are in the Riverside county and if I have to go there, I would like to talk to someone who could guide me as how to go about this, in the proper manner, and reach the proper channels. Yours, John J. Mazer Mr. John J. Mazer 1650 Vista Grande Dr. Sierra Dawn Estates Hemet, California 92343
